description: Machine-readable rule engine manifest mapping rules to file patterns and enforcement actions

rules.name: tool-manifest-sync-required
rules.description: Do not change a tool manifest without updating the corresponding skill definition

action.message: Tool manifest change requires synchronized skill definition update. Run tool-contract-sync skill.

rules.name: no-identity-modifications-without-review
rules.description: Never modify shared/identity/ without a security review

action.message: Modifications to shared/identity/ require explicit security review and 2 approvals.

rules.name: no-manual-migration-changes
rules.description: Never modify layer4-agents/migrations/ by hand. Use Alembic.

action.message: Use 'alembic revision --autogenerate -m "description"' instead of hand-editing migrations.

rules.name: never-weaken-tests
rules.description: Never remove or weaken existing tests. If a test blocks you, understand why.

action.message: Test removal or weakening requires explicit justification and team approval.

rules.name: no-pii-in-prompts
rules.description: No PII in prompts — pre-process with detector

action.message: PII detected in LLM prompt. Scrub before sending to external model.

rules.name: parameterized-queries-only
rules.description: All SQL must use parameterized queries

action.message: Raw SQL string concatenation detected. Use SQLAlchemy parameters or prepared statements.

rules.name: auth-middleware-on-all-routes
rules.description: All API routes must have auth middleware unless explicitly exempted

action.message: API route missing authentication. Add @require_auth or document exemption.

rules.name: sql-change-requires-migration-and-rollback
rules.description: Any SQL change requires a migration file and a rollback script

action.message: Schema change detected. Ensure migration file AND rollback script exist.
Frontend code importing backend modules. Use API contracts instead.

rules.name: layer-import-order
rules.description: Layers can only import from lower layers or shared/

action.message: Layer importing from a higher layer. Only lower-layer and shared/ imports are permitted.

rules.name: shared-identity-is-leaf
rules.description: shared/identity/ should not import from other layers to avoid circular dependencies

action.message: shared/identity/ importing from application layers risks circular dependencies.

rules.name: ruff-zero-warnings
rules.description: Ruff linting must pass with zero warnings in CI

action.message: Ruff warnings detected. Run 'ruff check --fix' before committing.

rules.name: eslint-zero-warnings
rules.description: ESLint must pass with zero warnings in CI

action.message: ESLint warnings detected. Run linter auto-fix before committing.

rules.name: type-checking-pass
rules.description: mypy/pyright must pass for Python; tsc must pass for TypeScript

action.message: Type checking failed. Fix type errors before committing.

rules.name: no-soql-string-interpolation
rules.description: Never interpolate user input into SOQL or SQL query strings

action.message: SOQL/SQL string interpolation detected. Use parameterized queries or query builders.

rules.name: no-dev-auth-bypass-in-production
rules.description: DevAuthBypassMiddleware must never be enabled in production

action.message: Dev auth bypass detected in production-facing code or config. Remove immediately.
